resolvedQuestions.text: Decisive external smoke (8-run, route-proof-augmented, baseline-controlled) — iter 5
Symptoms = MIX: mis-routing (A/B/C, orchestrate rows incomplete) + new mode D (GPT-vs-state-machine literalism) + latency (role-resolution overhead) — iter 6,7,8
Keep ai-council mode:all; do NOT convert; add route-proof header — iter 9,10,11
Orchestrate delegates deep-dispatch to deep.md via single deterministic rule (dispatch @deep + STOP) — iter 12,13
Feasible hook-based enforcement plugin in system-skill-advisor; detection-layer, not hard identity — iter 14,15
8-run, 2-metric benchmark (latency + route-proof) reusable as baseline now + regression gate after fixes — iter 16,17
Literal-safe pattern = table + bounded clarification + structured header + hard boundaries; apply to ROUTING surfaces only — iter 18,19
6 in-scope paths (orchestrate, 4 command seams, CLI seam, advisor plugin) + .claude mirrors; Codex + improvement-family deferred — iter 20,21,22
WAIT on KQ1 external smoke + cheaper layers; unpark FIX-5 only on measured negative-gate (GPT<4/4 vs Claude=4/4 after KQ4+KQ5) — iter 23,24

keyFindings: Root cause reconfirmed: subagent_type normalized to "general"; soft identity boundary (../001 §1).
deep.md literal-safe = deterministic table + single bounded clarification + structured header + 5 hard boundaries (deep.md:34-98).
orchestrate.md deep-path is judgment-dependent: missing deep-context/deep-review rows + fill-in Deep Route field (orchestrate.md:95-105,207).
Phase 005 inconclusive cause = cli-opencode 3-layer self-invocation guard tripped on OPENCODE_PID (cli-opencode/SKILL.md:66,87,319; 005:120).
NEW mode D: GPT reads soft advisory command-prose as hard gates and halts (separable from A/B/C routing + latency) — iter 7.
KQ5 plugin catches route/identity mismatch but NOT semantic wrong-mode (the §5 false-negative) — iter 25.
FIX-5 wait is risk-asymmetric (reversible) vs unpark-now (architectural, irreversible) — iter 24.
